## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include any error messages or unexpected visual output.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| macOS version | e.g. 14.4 |
| Mac chip | Apple Silicon / Intel |
| Number of displays | e.g. 2 |
| Number of Spaces | e.g. 5 |
| SpacesGrid version | e.g. 1.0.0 |
| Grid layout | e.g. 5 × 2 |

## Screenshots or screen recording

If applicable, add a screenshot or recording to help explain the problem.

## Console logs

1. Open **Console.app**
2. Filter by **"SpacesGrid"**

(paste logs here)

## Additional context

Anything else that might be relevant.
